subject: WalletWallVault

remediation.rationale: The reported source commit 828bf219c0e2612fcd1aba5f085c4abeba29de88 is absent from public repository history, and public HEAD recompiles WalletWallVault to a 22,138-byte runtime rather than the deployed 20,508-byte runtime. Because the original deployment commit cannot be published, the honest path to a clean third-party reproduction is to redeploy from public HEAD and replace this record.
steps: From a clean checkout of public main, run `npm ci` and `npm run compile`; record the compiler version, optimizer settings, and the keccak256 of the WalletWallVault runtime bytecode (this becomes artifactManifest.bytecodeHash).

Deploy WalletWallVault + MockMLDSAVerifier from public HEAD to Ethereum Sepolia (chainId 11155111) using the safe deploy path; never use a real-funds wallet, only a funded throwaway Sepolia testnet key.
Read the live runtime bytecode of the newly deployed address and confirm its byte length and keccak256 match the locally compiled public-HEAD artifact.

Update docs/Deployments.md (Ethereum Sepolia — active testnet) and this manifest with the new deployedAddress, deploymentTx, reportedSourceCommit (a commit that IS in public history), observedRuntimeBytes, and artifactManifest, then set reproducibilityStatus to `reproducible`.
Run `npm run validate:reproducibility` and `npm run validate:deployments`; only commit the updated records once both pass.
remediation.alternatePath: publish-source-tag-and-manifest: if the exact deployment commit can be located and published as a public tag, publish it together with a build artifact manifest (compiler version, settings, and runtime bytecode keccak256 that reproduces the deployed 20,508-byte runtime), then set reproducibilityStatus to `reproducible` with that artifactManifest.

disclosures: Research prototype. Not audited. Testnet only (Ethereum Sepolia). Do not use real funds.
Source verification is not configured, and bytecode reproducibility from the reported deployment commit has not been independently confirmed.
The PQ gate is MockMLDSAVerifier — structural checks only, with no real on-chain ML-DSA cryptographic verification.
No Ethereum mainnet deployment exists or is planned; this record documents a testnet deployment only.
This deployment's reproducibility is remediation-gated: it is not yet reproducible from public sources, and the steps above are the committed path to make it so.
